name: xau_bb_rsi_meanrev_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, after a close outside Bollinger Bands with an extreme RSI(7) reading and sufficient BB-width volatility, price reverts to the middle band within 30 bars. Falsified if trade count >= 200 but PF < 1.3 or win rate < 45%.

regime_filter.description: Require BB width above 30th percentile of last 100 bars to avoid dead-range chop. Not always-on: excludes lowest-vol 30% of bars.

notes: Validate plumbing first: if signal_raw==0 across full window, signal logic is broken; if signal_raw>0 but orders_filled==0, gating is broken.
